visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a green knit sweater. She is demonstrating an incorrect makeup application technique on her chin, which has visible red blemishes. A red circle with a white 'X' is overlaid at the top of the frame. She uses a cotton swab and a beige sponge. (2) The scene transitions as a green circle with an 'O' appears. The woman smiles and points upwards, signaling a better method. She holds up a three-color concealer palette and a small application brush. The lighting is bright and uniform, suggesting an indoor studio environment. (3) Close-up shots feature the KRYOLAN brand concealer palette and its packaging. The woman displays the product clearly to the camera, showcasing the three distinct shades of beige and tan within the circular container. (4) In the application phase, she uses a precision brush to apply the concealer to specific spots on her face. Sequential numbering (1-4) appears on screen to guide the viewer. She demonstrates the process of waiting several seconds before blending the edges for better coverage. (5) A split-screen or sequential comparison labeled with '素顏狀態' and '用歌劇魅影後' shows the effectiveness of the product. The red blemish on her face is completely hidden in the 'after' shot, leaving the skin looking smooth and flawless. (6) She then introduces a secondary product, a loose setting powder in a frosted jar. She uses a large, fluffy makeup brush to apply the powder to her cheeks and forehead to set her makeup. (7) The final phase shows the woman posing and smiling, displaying a complete and flawless makeup look with smooth skin texture and enhanced facial features. Animated sparkle effects appear around her to emphasize the 'glow' of the finished result.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: X. [Subtitle]: 你們還在這樣畫遮瑕嗎？ (2) [Variety]: X. [Subtitle]: 絕對不行!! [Variety]: 😫. (3) [Variety]: X. [Subtitle]: 這樣真的沒辦法完全將瑕疵遮蔽掉！ (4) [Logo]: 🇰🇷韓國歐膩告訴正確的方式! [Subtitle]: 韓國歐膩告訴正確的方式! (5) [Variety]: O. [Subtitle]: 但!一定要用粉霜膏型態的產品跟小化妝筆! (6) [Subtitle]: 這樣可以將臉部瑕疵都完美藏起來 🌸. (7) [Variety]: ?!. [Subtitle]: 可能有人會問 "歐膩, 台灣可以買到固體的遮瑕嗎?" (8) [Variety]: 有啊!. [Subtitle]: 有啊! (9) [Logo]: KRYOLAN. [Slogan]: 歌劇魅影 光影塑形三效粉霜. (10) [Subtitle]: 而且這個色號種類也很多. (11) [Subtitle]: 每款都有：提亮、修飾、基底色 可以用到粉底、遮瑕、修容 三效合一. (12) [Subtitle]: 1. 用小筆塗基底色 (用少量即可). (13) [Subtitle]: 2. 在瑕疵部位上適當量. (14) [Variety]: 重點. [Subtitle]: 3. 再等5-10秒!!!. (15) [Subtitle]: 4. 再稍微塗一下遮瑕部位的「邊界」. (16) [Variety]: ✨. [Subtitle]: 這樣遮瑕力超棒. (17) [Variety]: (素顏狀態). (18) [Variety]: (用歌劇魅影後). [Subtitle]: 10公分近焦無瑕. (19) [Subtitle]: 粉底在上的時候延展性很強 因為是天然蜂蠟質地很容易抹開. (20) [Subtitle]: 依照三色來去搭配皮膚上的顏色做遮瑕 可配合一年四季的肌膚顏色變化隨時調色!. (21) [Subtitle]: 如果新手們用一般粉末型態的修容的話 可能會不習慣用化妝刷塗得比較不自然!. (22) [Logo]: KRYOLAN. [Slogan]: 但「光影塑形三效粉霜」是膏狀 用法超級簡單!. (23) [Subtitle]: 用指溫多次畫圈的方式去融化膏體 上妝很保濕!. (24) [Subtitle]: 抗汗水, 混合偏乾, 乾性肌膚可以使用!. (25) [Logo]: KRYOLAN. [Slogan]: 歌劇魅影 超濾鏡柔光蜜粉. [Subtitle]: 他們的超濾鏡柔光蜜粉也很好用. (26) [Subtitle]: 粉質非常細緻 而且非常輕盈 所以又叫 ☁️雲朵蜜粉☁️. (27) [Subtitle]: 顏色透明, 毛孔都霧化~. (28) [Subtitle]: 在台灣大熱天的陽光下 🌸也能讓肌膚維持若美肌自帶濾鏡🌸. (29) [Subtitle]: 這樣就可以20小時完美持妝. (30) [Subtitle]: 從沒什麼立體感的妝容也可以變成超立體的立體容顏!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the tutorial.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long, dark wavy hair wearing a bright green knit sweater. She has clear makeup initially except for visible red spots on her skin, which she then conceals.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, neutral-toned wall with soft shadows, consistent with a professional indoor studio or home office setup.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female speaker in Traditional Chinese Mandarin. She poses a rhetorical question with a sharp, rising intonation. An upbeat, major-key acoustic pop BGM with a steady drum beat supports the narration. (2) A clear 'ding' SFX sounds, marking a transition to the instructional part of the track. The speaker's tone remains friendly and highly animated, characteristic of beauty influencers. The BGM remains constant at roughly 120 BPM. (3) The speaker mentions the brand name 'KRYOLAN' with crisp articulation. Subtle 'pop' sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of numerical list items in the visual frame. The vocal delivery speed is fast but clear. (4) As the reveal of the finished makeup occurs, a sparkling 'magic chime' sound effect is heard, signaling a successful result. The speaker's volume increases slightly to convey excitement. (5) The track concludes with a rapid-fire delivery of technical product benefits (beeswax texture, sweat-proof). The music swells slightly for the finale before a hard cut at the very end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Problem -> Solution -> Product Introduction -> Demonstration -> Result -> Detailed Features
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote KRYOLAN concealer and powder products by demonstrating a professional makeup technique that effectively hides skin blemishes. The video uses a persuasive 'Korean sister' persona to build trust and provide actionable beauty advice.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator repeatedly highlights the KRYOLAN brand name, shows the product packaging in detail, and lists specific functional benefits of the products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density information delivery with rapid visual and audio cuts designed for short-form social media platforms.
